# BhaivaTech

> BhaivaTech is a software development company based in Bangalore, India, serving clients globally. We specialize in website development, web applications, frontend & backend development, mobile apps, UI/UX design, cloud deployment, and AWS hosting solutions.

## About

BhaivaTech helps startups and local businesses build fast, scalable, and affordable digital products. We offer end-to-end web and mobile development services starting at ₹4999, with a focus on clean code, modern design, and long-term growth.

- Founded: 2026
- Location: Bangalore, Karnataka, India
- Service Areas: India, United States, United Kingdom, Australia
- Contact: contact@bhaivatech.com
- Phone: +91 82778 07904
- Website: https://bhaivatech.com

## Services

- Website Development: Responsive, SEO-optimized websites and e-commerce stores
- Web Application Development: Scalable, custom web apps for startups and businesses
- Mobile App Development: Cross-platform apps using Flutter and React Native
- Backend & API Development: Secure, high-performance server-side systems
- UI/UX Design: Clean, intuitive interfaces for better user engagement
- Cloud & AWS Deployment: Hosting, deployment, and infrastructure management
- SEO & Digital Presence: Technical SEO, Google Business Profile, and online visibility

## Pricing

- Projects starting from ₹4999
- Custom pricing based on project scope
- Flexible, tiered pricing for startups and local businesses

## Pages

- [Home](https://bhaivatech.com/): Overview of services, portfolio, and pricing
- [About](https://bhaivatech.com/about): Company background, team, and process
- [Services](https://bhaivatech.com/services): Detailed list of all services offered
- [Projects](https://bhaivatech.com/projects): Portfolio of completed work
- [Contact](https://bhaivatech.com/contact): Get in touch or request a free quote
- [Sitemap](https://bhaivatech.com/sitemap): Full site structure

## Technology Stack

- Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS
- Backend: Node.js, Express, PHP
- Mobile: Flutter, React Native
- Database: MySQL, MongoDB, Firebase
- Cloud: AWS, Cloudflare
- Deployment: GitHub Actions, FTP, cPanel

## Target Audience

- Indian startups looking for affordable web development
- Local businesses wanting to establish online presence
- Small and medium businesses across India
- International clients seeking cost-effective development

## Why BhaivaTech

- Affordable pricing starting at ₹4999
- Fast delivery — go live in as little as 4 weeks
- Clean, scalable, maintainable code
- SEO-optimized from day one
- 24/7 support and ongoing maintenance
- Based in Bangalore, serving clients globally
